question: Around which hazard classes must you never smoke?
canonical_answer:
Class 1 (Explosives)
Class 2.1 (Flammable Gas)
Class 3 (Flammable Liquids)
Class 4 (Flammable Solids)
Class 5 (Oxidizers)

appears_in.title: Arkansas Hazmat Test
appears_in.answer: Class 1 explosives, class 4 flammable solids, class 5 oxidizers, class 3 flammable liquids
